'''Tanass Brila''' owned and operated [[Brila Industrial Supplies]]. Along with his wife, [[Renia Brila|Renia]], he was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He originally utilized peaceful protests to fight the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which caught the attention of the local Rebel cell, and eventually Tanass gave up on his peaceful approach and joined the Rebellion. It was rumored he was a money launderer for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. He was an avid fan of [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] and would often purchase new ones on a whim.<ref name="H&S" />
